ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the institution is private (Yes/No) */,
  "apps" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "accept" INTEGER /* Number of applications accepted */,
  "enroll" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "top10perc" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the top 10% of their high school class */,
  "top25perc" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the top 25% of their high school class */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the institution */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the institution */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the institution (private/public) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., institutional reports, government databases) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number for data management and audit trails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES institution_category ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic data */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "f_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of full-time undergraduates */,
  "p_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of part-time undergraduates */,
  "outstate" INTEGER /* Out-of-state tuition costs */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by ethnicity */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of students */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., surveys, institutional records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial data */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "room_board" INTEGER /* Cost of room and board */,
  "books" INTEGER /* Cost of books per year */,
  "personal" INTEGER /* Personal expenses */,
  "expend" INTEGER /* Total expenditures per student */,
  "tuition_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of tuition per year */,
  "financial_aid_offered" INTEGER /* Total financial aid offered to students */,
  "scholarships" INTEGER /* Total amount of scholarships awarded */,
  "loans" INTEGER /* Total amount of student loans */,
  "endowment" INTEGER /* Total endowment of the institution */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., financial reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_rates" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for graduation rates data */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "grad_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate percentage */,
  "phd" INTEGER /* Number of PhD graduates */,
  "terminal" INTEGER /* Number of terminal degree graduates */,
  "sf_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-faculty ratio */,
  "graduation_time" TEXT /* Average time to graduation */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate of students from one year to the next */,
  "transfer_rate" REAL /* Rate of students transferring to other institutions */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., institutional records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_rates_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alumni_outcomes" (
  "outcomes_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for alumni outcomes data */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "perc_alumni" REAL /* Percentage of alumni who are employed or in further education */,
  "average_salary" INTEGER /* Average salary of alumni */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of alumni who are employed */,
  "further_education_rate" REAL /* Percentage of alumni who are in further education */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., surveys, institutional records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcomes_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_outcomes_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_category" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Private, Public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_stats" (
  "app_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for application stats */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "total_apps" INTEGER /* Total number of applications received */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate as a percentage */,
  "early_decision_apps" INTEGER /* Number of early decision applications */,
  "early_action_apps" INTEGER /* Number of early action applications */,
  "waitlist_apps" INTEGER /* Number of applications from the waitlist */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Yield rate (percentage of accepted students who enroll) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., institutional records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_stats_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_stats" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for enrollment stats */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "full_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of full-time students */,
  "part_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of part-time students */,
  "graduate_students" INTEGER /* Number of graduate students */,
  "undergraduate_students" INTEGER /* Number of undergraduate students */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., institutional records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_stats_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_details" (
  "details_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for institution details */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution including history and mission */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the institution */,
  "vision_statement" TEXT /* Vision statement of the institution */,
  "values_statement" TEXT /* Values statement of the institution */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., institutional reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("details_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_details_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for validation records */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of any issues found during validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for audit records */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being audited */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for users */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_management_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
